name: User Research
prompts: Create a survey with 10 questions about user preferences.
Design an experiment to test the effectiveness of a new feature.
Analyze user feedback and identify areas for improvement.

name: Product Development
prompts: Generate ideas for new product features based on market trends.
Plan a marketing campaign targeting a specific demographic.
Develop a prototype for a new AI-powered device.

name: Customer Support
prompts: Craft a personalized response to an angry customer complaint.
Train your chatbot to handle common questions and scenarios.
Analyze customer sentiment from social media feedback.

name: Training Data Generation
prompts: Write a dataset of 1000 sentences about the benefits of AI in everyday life.
Create a series of images with captions that showcase AI technology.
Generate fictional data to train a model for a specific use case.

name: Sentiment Analysis
prompts: Analyze customer reviews and identify common pain points.
Track social media sentiment around a particular product or brand.
Examine the impact of news events on public perception.

name: Data Visualization
prompts: Create an interactive dashboard to display real-time data.
Design a visualization to help stakeholders understand complex trends.
Analyze historical data to identify patterns and make predictions.
